data.title: ExaGrid recognized on 2025 MES Midmarket 100 list for IT solutions, includes Tiered Backup Storage with Retention Time-Lock and non-network-facing tier.
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, ExaGrid® unveiled that its Tiered Backup Storage system, featuring Retention Time-Lock and a non-network-facing tier for enhanced security known as a tiered air gap, has been recognized by MES Computing as one of the top technology providers for midmarket organizations. This distinction was awarded as part of the 2025 MES Midmarket 100 list, which celebrates companies with expertise in catering to the specific IT requirements of midsize enterprises. ExaGrid's innovative solution also offers delayed deletes and immutability to bolster ransomware recovery efforts.

data.title: Enlightify Inc. invests $20M in Cyber Token, showing commitment to Web3 infrastructure and blockchain technology.
data.description: In Xi'an, China, on July 17, 2025, Enlightify Inc. (NYSE: ENFY) revealed a significant move by investing as much as $20 million in Cyber. Cyber is known for its prominent blockchain ecosystem that focuses on decentralized AI and social infrastructure.

data.title: Encore Search named #1 executive recruiting firm by Houston Business Journal, outperforming competitors.
data.description: Encore Search Partners in Houston topped the list of Largest Executive Search Firms on the Houston Business Journal's annual ranking. The firm has surpassed its competitors through high-impact placements and a performance-driven culture. This achievement was announced on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Zebra Systems boosts North State Cyber Solutions growth by 37% through exceptional service partnership. CEO Bill O'Boyle's success story highlighted.
data.description: The success story of CEO Bill O'Boyle is featured in a new video released by Zebra Systems LLC, a prominent Cloud Services and value-added distributor. The video, launched on July 17, 2025, highlights Zebra's crucial role in the expansion of businesses. Located in Charlotte, N.C., Zebra Systems LLC continues to demonstrate its leadership in the industry through innovative solutions and unwavering dedication to its partners. The video presents a firsthand account of the impact of Zebra's services, emphasizing the company's commitment to driving growth and success.

data.title: BioCatch introduces Scams360 to aid banks in identifying new scam types; defends against full spectrum of scams.
data.description: A unified platform has been introduced to combat a wide range of scams, announced by BioCatch in New York on July 17, 2025. By analyzing human behavior patterns, BioCatch aims to thwart financial crimes. The company unveiled the newest version of its behavior-focused anti-scam tool, providing a comprehensive defense mechanism.

data.title: Blue Owl Capital closes $850 million private offering for Alternative Credit Fund, marking a new growth phase.
data.description: Blue Owl Capital Inc., a prominent alternative asset manager traded on the NYSE under the symbol OWL, recently completed a private offering for an alternative credit fund. The firm successfully secured a total of $850 million in funding to support its next phase of expansion and growth. The closure of this offering marks a significant milestone for Blue Owl as it prepares to embark on a new chapter in its development within the Alternative Credit sector.

data.title: Ribbon Communications Inc. appoints Fahad Najam as Senior VP for Investor Relations and Corporate Strategy. Nasdaq: RBBN.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, on July 17, 2025, Ribbon Communications Inc. (Nasdaq: RBBN), a prominent company in real-time communications technology and IP optical networking solutions, has announced the appointment of Fahad Najam as the new Senior Vice President for Investor Relations and Corporate Strategy. This move is pivotal for the company as it aims to enhance its strategic planning and engage with investors more effectively. Najam will bring his expertise to drive the company's growth and secure investments.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson gets FDA Priority Review for TAR-200 NDA in bladder cancer. Phase 2b study cited.
data.description: The recent New Drug Application, backed by findings from the Phase 2b SunRISe-1 study, has been the highlight in Raritan, N.J. on July 17, 2025. Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has conferred Priority Review status to the NDA submission. This development signifies a significant step forward in the review process for the new drug under consideration by the FDA.

data.title: NETSCOUT supports zero-trust architectures, aligning with NIST initiatives; aids federal agencies in data security.
data.description: NETSCOUT SYSTEMS, INC., a prominent provider of observability, AIOps, cybersecurity, and DDoS attack protection solutions, revealed their alignment with National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) initiatives to aid U.S. federal agencies in adopting standards and best practices for zero-trust security frameworks. This initiative aims to safeguard data and resources across hybrid environments with high-availability requirements. NETSCOUT is listed on NASDAQ as NTCT.

data.title: AI adoption spurs growth and risk mitigation in Asia's E-Commerce sector but regional gaps and cost barriers persist. India and China lead with Southeast Asia catching up.
data.description: A new report titled "AI in Asia's E-Commerce and Payments: Adoption, ROI, Risk, and Governance Outlook 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights the increasing adoption of AI in Asia's E-Commerce and Payments sectors, leading to growth and better risk management. However, it also points out regional disparities and cost challenges. The adoption of AI in Asia's E-Commerce industry is not uniform, with India and China leading the way while Southeast Asia is progressing at a slower pace. Notably, there are persistent gaps in AI integration within the E-Commerce sector in Asia.

data.title: Cookies, CKS Distro, and LTNC introduce Adios, RTD tequila brand with Casa Rica tequila, in 4 flavors. Refreshing summer cocktail.
data.description: Cookies, a renowned lifestyle and cannabis brand, has announced their venture into the spirits market with the introduction of Adios, a line of ready-to-drink (RTD) beverages. This new line is made with ultra-premium tequila sourced from Casa Rica and real fruit juice, embodying a fusion of bold flavors and high quality that the brand is known for. The Adios beverages are designed to provide a refreshing and easily consumable cocktail experience for the summer season. This strategic move into the spirits sector reflects the brand's innovative approach to expanding its product offerings.

data.title: Inaugural ESSENCE HBCU Kickoff Classic at Harvard Stadium this Labor Day Weekend brings HBCU football to Boston for the first time, uniting culture, community, and college athletics - Boston, July 17, 2025.
data.description: Harvard Stadium will host the first-ever ESSENCE Kickoff Classic this Labor Day Weekend, a groundbreaking event presented by ESSENCE and MeetBoston. This historic occasion marks the introduction of HBCU football to Boston, showcasing the intersection of culture, community, and college sports. The event, scheduled for July 17, 2025, promises to unite diverse audiences and celebrate the rich legacy of Historically Black Colleges and Universities. Don't miss this unique opportunity to witness a fusion of sports and culture at one of the most renowned venues in Boston.

data.title: J.S. Held expert teams receive industry acclaim across six continents in mid-year update. #Jericho #GlobalConsulting #PRNewswire
data.description: In Jericho, New York, on July 17, 2025, J.S. Held, a global consulting firm, is pleased to announce multiple accolades for both the company and its industry professionals in the latest update. J.S. Held boasts a diverse array of specialized teams comprising technical, scientific, and financial experts, showcasing unparalleled expertise.

data.title: Sensata Technologies unveils High Efficiency Contactor for smooth transition to 400V/800V EV charging.
data.description: A new High Efficiency Contactor (HEC) has been recently introduced by Sensata in Swindon, United Kingdom. This innovative product aims to streamline the shift from 400V to 800V electric vehicle (EV) systems. The HEC is designed to enhance efficiency and performance in EV architectures, catering to the growing demand for higher voltage systems. This new development by Sensata signifies a significant advancement in the EV industry and demonstrates the company's commitment to innovation.
